name: slicksync
description: Syncio - Stremio addon and user management system

scripts.server:private:watch: cp prisma/schema.sqlite.prisma prisma/schema.prisma && bunx prisma generate && QUIET=true NEXT_PUBLIC_DEBUG=true AUTH_ENABLED=false REDIS_URL="redis://localhost:6379" JWT_SECRET="temp-jwt-secret-key" ENCRYPTION_KEY="temp-encryption-key-32-chars-long" SYNCIO_PRIVATE_USERNAME="${SYNCIO_PRIVATE_USERNAME}" SYNCIO_PRIVATE_PASSWORD="${SYNCIO_PRIVATE_PASSWORD}" nodemon --config nodemon.json server/index.js
scripts.server:public:watch: cp prisma/schema.postgres.prisma prisma/schema.prisma && bunx prisma generate && QUIET=false NEXT_PUBLIC_DEBUG=true AUTH_ENABLED=true DATABASE_URL="postgresql://syncio:syncio@localhost:5432/syncio" REDIS_URL="redis://localhost:6379" JWT_SECRET="temp-jwt-secret-key" ENCRYPTION_KEY="temp-encryption-key-32-chars-long" nodemon server/index.js
scripts.studio: cp prisma/schema.sqlite.prisma prisma/schema.prisma && bunx prisma generate && DATABASE_URL="file:./prisma/sqlite.db" bunx prisma studio
scripts.studio:public: cp prisma/schema.postgres.prisma prisma/schema.prisma && bunx prisma generate && DATABASE_URL="postgresql://syncio:syncio@localhost:5432/syncio" bunx prisma studio

author: Syncio Team
